'''pamudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadkill|roadkill]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-m-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadkill|roadkill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pamudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæmidhith|pæmidhith]] || [[word:pæmidhij|pæmidhij]] || [[word:pæmidhish|pæmidhish]] || [[word:pæmidhi|pæmidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pamumudhuth|pamumudhuth]] || [[word:pamumudhuj|pamumudhuj]] || [[word:pamumudhush|pamumudhush]] || [[word:pamumudhu|pamumudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pamudhuth|pamudhuth]] || [[word:pamudhuj|pamudhuj]] || [[word:pamudhush|pamudhush]] || [[word:pamudhu|pamudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pamufdhufth|pamufdhufth]] || [[word:pamufdhufj|pamufdhufj]] || [[word:pamufdhufsh|pamufdhufsh]] || [[word:pamufdhuf|pamufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pamudhuthu|pamudhuthu]] || [[word:pamudhuju|pamudhuju]] || [[word:pamudhushu|pamudhushu]] || [[word:pamudhuku|pamudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pamudhuth|pamudhuth]] || [[word:pamudhuj|pamudhuj]] || [[word:pamudhush|pamudhush]] || [[word:pamudhu|pamudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pamudhuthul|pamudhuthul]] || [[word:pamudhujul|pamudhujul]] || [[word:pamudhushul|pamudhushul]] || [[word:pamudhukul|pamudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pamudhuuthuthu|pamudhuuthuthu]] || [[word:pamudhuujuju|pamudhuujuju]] || [[word:pamudhuushushu|pamudhuushushu]] || [[word:pamudhuuku|pamudhuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pamudhuthun|pamudhuthun]] || [[word:pamudhujun|pamudhujun]] || [[word:pamudhushun|pamudhushun]] || [[word:pamudhukun|pamudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pamudhuthuoro|pamudhuthuoro]] || [[word:pamudhujuoro|pamudhujuoro]] || [[word:pamudhushuoro|pamudhushuoro]] || [[word:pamudhukuoro|pamudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
